|desc={{p|Magneton}} is Molayne's first known Pokémon. It was first seen interacting with {{an|Sophocles}}'s {{TP|Sophocles|Togedemaru}} after she had absorbed {{AP|Pikachu}}'s electricity, causing everyone around them to get shocked.

Magneton reappeared in ''[[SM092|Turning the Other Mask!]]'', where it caused the lights to go out at the {{ci|Hau'oli}} Mini-Mini [[Battle Royal Dome]], allowing Kukui to change into Masked Royal and defeat [[Mad Magmar]].

None of Magneton's moves are known.}}
